summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of NEW HazMat Inspection Worksheet feature. All 15 test cases passed. The worksheet correctly implements 7-step collapsible checklist with 113 checkable items, localStorage persistence, progress tracking, inspector tips, CFR reference links to eCFR.gov, and Quick Reference section.
passed_tests: HazMat nav button in header (gold 'HazMat' button) navigates to /hazmat-worksheet (data-testid='hazmat-nav-btn')

All 7 steps displayed with correct titles: Collect Required Documents, Check the Shipping Paper, Check for Authorized Packages & Exceptions, Check for Placarding Compliance, Check Marking Compliance, Check Labeling Compliance, Check Loading & Packaging Compliance
Step 1 is expanded by default, Steps 2-7 are collapsed
Progress bar updates when items are checked (shows X/113 and percentage)
Step completion shows green check icon and full progress bar (emerald color)
Inspector tip buttons expand/collapse inline tips (data-testid='tip-toggle') - 39 tips available
CFR references are clickable links to eCFR.gov - 67 links found
Quick Reference section at bottom is collapsible (data-testid='quick-ref-toggle')
Reset button clears all checkboxes with confirmation dialog (data-testid='reset-btn')
Back button navigates to home page (data-testid='back-btn')
Overall progress counter shows correct values (113 total checkable items)
Sub-section headers display correctly within steps (CHECK BASIC SHIPPING DESCRIPTION, REPORTABLE QUANTITIES, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: HazMatWorksheet.js is well-structured with proper React hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo)
localStorage persistence implemented correctly with try-catch for JSON parsing
ecfrUrl() helper function correctly generates eCFR.gov links from CFR references
STEPS constant contains comprehensive 49 CFR HazMat inspection data with 113 checkable items
Progress calculation uses useMemo for performance optimization
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - all data stored in localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: HazMat Worksheet feature fully tested. Key data-testids: hazmat-worksheet (page), hazmat-nav-btn (header button), step-{1-7} (step containers), step-{1-7}-toggle (expand/collapse), check-{id} (checkboxes like check-1.1), tip-toggle (inspector tips), quick-reference, quick-ref-toggle, reset-btn, back-btn, overall-progress. localStorage key: 'hazmat-worksheet-checks'. Total 113 checkable items across 7 steps: Step 1 (4), Step 2 (25), Step 3 (3), Step 4 (20), Step 5 (33), Step 6 (8), Step 7 (20).
